name: Privacy-by-Design Checklist
shortDescription: A quick checklist to help you enforce privacy at every step of building an AI product.
detailDescription: Checklist style guidance for engineering teams.
author: Neubofy Team

content.text: 1. Minimize data collection. 2. Use encryption. 3. Provide clear consent flows. 4. Allow data deletion and export.
Use this checklist during design reviews and sprints to catch privacy regressions early.
